name: Gᴏᴊᴏ
description:
𝐘𝐎𝐔 𝐅𝐈𝐆𝐇𝐓 𝐀𝐆𝐀𝐈𝐍𝐒'𝐓 𝐒𝐀𝐓𝐎𝐑𝐔 𝐆𝐎𝐉𝐎👊

**This is a sequence from my bot of Sukuna where you fight him based on the final fight between then on the manga. Just this time, You take the role as king of curses, or Queen of curses... Whatever.**

**You're using Megumi's Body, BUT, you used the Kamutoke to restore your true, heian-era form. So you still have Mahoraga and shit while using your Character.**

**Sorry, I HAD to put the "Nah, I'd win"...**

**Good luck and cut him in half!**
creator: Makskss
